repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Harvard University. Graduate School of Design. Francis L. Loeb Library scrapbooks

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Harvard University. Graduate School of Design. Francis L. Loeb Library

did.abstract: Microfilm of nine volumes of newspaper clippings concerning city planning, landscape architecture, and housing, especially in the Boston area.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Microfilm of nine volumes of newspaper clippings concerning city planning, landscape architecture, and housing, especially in the Boston area.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Harvard University. Graduate School of Design. Francis L. Loeb Library scrapbooks, #1533. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Nine volumes of newspaper clippings concerning city planning, landscape architecture, and housing, especially in the Boston area
